{{Quote|I want to help stop the Hutt... I'm no slaver. Besides, we haven't shut down the Trade Federation yet!|Kol Kotha to [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]]|<ref name="LucasArts">{{LucasArts|url=products/naboo/index_ie.html|text=''Star Wars: Battle for Naboo''}}</ref>}}
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] '''Kol Kotha''' led a dangerous life, and years of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] had hardened him. His dealing of illegal arms in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] attracted the attention of [[Borvo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. In need of Kol's extensive weapons knowledge and [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] skills, Borvo [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire|hired]] him as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].<ref name="LucasArts" />

When Naboo was [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Borvo allied with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kael (officer)|Kael]] and [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. The two pilots had [[Mission to the Naboo mountains|rescued]] [[Borvo the Hutt's freighter|Borvo's personal transport]], which Kotha was flying at the time. Kotha then went on to fly several [[Attack on disabled base|missions]] for the [[Naboo Resistance|resistance]] in his [[Borvo the Hutt's starfighter|starfighter]]. When Borvo betrayed the resistance and began selling the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], however, Kotha allied with Sykes and helped [[Attack on Porso Hill|destroy]] his former employer's operation.

Afterwards Kol [[Liberation of Camp Four|assisted in freeing]] several more officers and pilots from [[Camp Four/Legends|Camp Four]] in order to increase the resistance movement against the Trade Federation. He continued to [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|fight along side]] Sykes and the Naboo until the Federation was eventually [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|defeated]].

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Good work, Naboo boy. You saved your people, and Borvo is limping back to Nal Hutta.|Kol Kotha to [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]]|<ref name="LucasArts" />}}
In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'', Kotha's voice was provided by [[Terence McGovern]].
